sub_pixel_system.notes: Racing game; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Physics System
special_mechanics.description: Game features realistic vehicle behavior with precise vehicle data and dynamics. Different cars have distinct handling characteristics. Rally mode available in Special Edition provides arcade-style faster dynamics.

special_mechanics.name: Police Pursuit Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Police cars pursue player during races. Player receives tickets or arrest if caught. Three tickets results in arrest (two in Sega Saturn version).

special_mechanics.name: Traffic Avoidance
special_mechanics.description: Traffic vehicles appear on tracks and must be avoided by player.

tier_notes: Tier 2: This is a racing game, not a platformer/character action game. No player character movement physics documented. Vehicle dynamics emphasized as realistic but specific numerical parameters not provided in Wikipedia source.
